hero.headline:
Indonesian Youth
Outstanding Recognition Association
subheadlines: Born from the legacy of IYSA, IYORA stands as Indonesia's dedicated home for science olympiads — ensuring every outstanding scientific talent receives a stage worthy of their greatness.
We believe every brilliant mind deserves recognition. IYORA is here to discover, challenge, and elevate Indonesia's finest young scientists to the world stage.
From biology to mathematics, from physics to geography — IYORA manages 12 branches of science olympiads at national and international levels.
Over 50,000 students from 20 countries have proven themselves through our olympiads. Now it's your turn.

origin.title: Why Was IYORA Born?
origin.subtitle: A legacy that grew into two distinct strengths
origin.body:
Since its founding, IYSA has stood at the forefront of developing the scientific potential of Indonesia's youth. From national to international stages, thousands of students have been given the opportunity to compete, innovate, and prove their capabilities.

Yet as growth continued, two distinct worlds emerged under one roof: the world of invention — creating works and new solutions — and the world of olympiads — testing the depth of mastery over scientific knowledge.

Both are significant. Both are essential. Both deserve undivided attention.

And so IYORA was born — an institution entirely dedicated to a single mission: recognizing and elevating the finest young talent of Indonesia through science olympiads.
origin.conclusion: This is not a separation. This is specialization in pursuit of excellence.

competitions_section.title: Olympiads We Organize
competitions_section.subtitle: Twelve olympiad disciplines, one mission: discovering and elevating Indonesia's finest talent.

why.title: The Standards We Uphold
why.subtitle: Three pillars that set IYORA apart.
why.focus_desc: Undivided between invention and olympiads — 100% of our energy, resources, and innovation is devoted to one purpose: producing Indonesia's next generation of science champions.
why.network_desc: Connected with more than 20 countries, IYORA opens doors for Indonesian students to compete on the world stage and carry the nation's name with pride.
why.trust_desc: Built upon the proven track record of IYSA spanning over a decade, IYORA stands on a foundation of trust already earned and deeply established.

kurasi.title: IYORA Olympiads Officially Recognized by the Government
kurasi.subtitle: Every olympiad we organize has undergone the official accreditation process by Puspresnas, the National Achievement Center under Indonesia's Ministry of Education, Culture, Research, and Technology.
kurasi.what_is_desc: Accreditation (kurasi) is the official process of identification, assessment, and formal recognition by the Ministry of Education for talent competitions held outside the government. Accredited olympiads receive the highest validation from Indonesian educational institutions — ensuring that participants' certificates and achievements are genuinely recognized.
kurasi.b1_desc: Certificates from accredited olympiads carry high validity and are officially recognized by all educational institutions across Indonesia.
kurasi.b2_desc: Participants' achievements are entered into the Talent Management Information System (SIMT) Puspresnas, the government-managed national talent database.
kurasi.b3_desc: Accredited olympiad certificates are highly valuable for admission to top high schools and state universities in Indonesia.
kurasi.b4_title: Verified by the Ministry of Education
kurasi.b4_desc: Directly verified by a team of curators from the Ministry of Education, ensuring the competition meets the highest standards of quality and integrity.

cta_section.title: Ready to Compete at the Next Level?
cta_section.desc: Join tens of thousands of students from around the world who have chosen IYORA as their arena of excellence.

footer.tagline: Born from IYSA, Dedicated to Olympiads.
footer.copyright: © 2025 IYORA — Indonesian Youth Outstanding Recognition Association

about.hero_subtitle: Understanding who we are, where we come from, and where we are headed.
about.story_body:
IYORA was born from a simple yet powerful conviction: that excellence demands focus. For more than a decade, IYSA has demonstrated that Indonesia's youth are capable of competing on the world science stage. Now, by establishing IYORA as a dedicated olympiad institution, we carry that commitment to the next level.

Every olympiad we organize is an opportunity for a student to discover their greatest potential. Every medal is recognition of years of dedication and intellectual discipline. That is the essence of our name: Recognition — acknowledgment of excellence.
about.vision_body: To become Southeast Asia's foremost youth science olympiad institution, nurturing a generation of accomplished young scientists who are principled, globally competitive, and equipped to lead.
about.mission_1: Organize high-quality science olympiads at national and international levels
about.mission_2: Build a competition ecosystem that is fair, inclusive, and trustworthy
about.mission_3: Connect Indonesian students with a global network of young scientists
about.mission_4: Cultivate a culture of academic achievement grounded in scientific knowledge among Indonesian students
about.val_excellence_desc: The highest standards in every event we organize
about.val_integrity_desc: Competitions that are honest, fair, and transparent
about.val_inclusivity_desc: Open to all students from all backgrounds
about.val_innovation_desc: Continuously advancing in format and quality

competitions_page.subtitle: Twelve science olympiad disciplines, from national to international level.
